summary: Verified frontend + backend deletion flow for duplicate 'Cash Register Closings' rows on Reports page. Both layers work end-to-end.

backend.DELETE /api/reports/cash-register-closin: 200 OK -> {message: 'تم حذف السجل المكرر بنجاح', reversed_deposits, reversed_amount}
backend.Persistence check: Subsequent GET /api/reports/cash-register-closing no longer returns the deleted record; re-DELETE same id returns 404 (idempotent)

frontend.Login as admin@maestroegp.com/admin123: OK (12s splash observed as noted in handoff)
frontend.Navigate to /reports -> click tab 'إغلاق: Works via keyboard Enter after focusing the tab (Radix TabsTrigger). Programmatic .click() alone does NOT toggle Radix state.
frontend.Trash icon rendered on closed rows: 3 closed rows shown, each with data-testid=delete-closing-0/1/2 and receive-shift-0/1/2 (Wallet). No active shifts present at test time — but code path (line 1803) requires !closing.is_active which is correct.
frontend.Click trash -> window.confirm: Confirm dialog appeared with Arabic body: 'حذف هذا الصف المكرر؟ ... سيُحذف هذا السجل ويُعكس أي إيداع خزينة مرتبط به...'
frontend.Report refresh + row removed: closings count dropped from 3 → 2; UI stats updated (short cash 1,349 → 900 IQD, 'من 3 إغلاق' → 'من 2 إغلاق').
frontend.No logout/redirect: Stayed on /reports tab 'إغلاق الصندوق' after delete.

critical_code_review_comments: Reports.js is 5362 lines — should be split into per-tab components (CashRegisterClosingTab is already extracted but many others live in the same file).
handleDeleteClosing uses native window.confirm — acceptable for MVP but a styled AlertDialog would be more consistent with the rest of the shadcn UI.

Cash-register tab has its OWN date-range state (defaults to today); it does NOT inherit the top-level date filter. Confirmed intentional — but users may be confused when they widen the top filter and see nothing change here.

closingsFromHistory objects returned by GET /reports/cash-register-closings lack business_date/is_active/status fields, so the frontend cannot reliably filter these client-side; frontend correctly relies on API-side filtering. Backend should still emit these fields for consistency.
test_credentials: admin@maestroegp.com / admin123 (admin tenant=default) — used. cashier1@maestroegp.com / cash123 — used for RBAC 403 check.
seed_data_creation: No seeding needed — 7 closed cash_register_closings already existed for tenant default. After tests, 5 remain (deleted cda934c2 via curl and c21a4eea via UI).
context_for_next_testing_agent: The Radix TabsTrigger for 'إغلاق الصندوق' (index 6 of role='tab' list) does NOT respond to element.click() or force click alone. Reliable method: `await tabs[6].focus(); await page.keyboard.press('Enter')`. Also the app shows a full-screen splash-screen div (data-testid='splash-screen') with z-index 2147483647 that intercepts pointer events for several seconds — use force=True clicks after tab activation. window.confirm-based deletion works and triggers DELETE + auto-refresh. Active-shift NO-trash condition was NOT directly observed (no active shifts existed) but is code-guarded at Reports.js:1803 (canDeleteClosing && !closing.is_active) — safe.
rca of the issue: N/A — feature works. No bug to RCA.
